description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs: build and verify_signatures. Use the custom Docker image registry.gitlab.com/robigalia/runner:latest for the build job, which runs in the default stage and first clones the sel4-config, sel4, and sel4-sys repositories, then runs make x86_defconfig, builds the i686-sel4-robigalia target with xargo (debug and release), runs make x64_qemu_defconfig, and builds the x86_64-sel4-robigalia target with xargo (debug and release). In the verify_signatures job, use the ubuntu:18.04 image, run apt update and install python-pexpect gnupg2 git, clone the meta repository, list and import GPG keys from ./meta/.gnupg/pubring.kbx, list keys with fingerprints, and execute ./meta/verify-signatures.py HEAD ./meta/.mailmap. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
